name: Banana Walnut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Spray a 12-muffin tin with no-stick cooking spray.
3. Mash the bananas in a medium mixing bowl.
4. Add sugar, brown sugar, and eggs to the mashed bananas. Mix well.
5. Stir in the butter until combined.
6. Gradually add flour, whole wheat flour, and baking soda.
7. Pour in buttermilk and walnuts. Mix until just moistened.
8. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin tin.
9. Bake for about 20 minutes or until the muffins are brown and cooked through.
10. Yield: 12 muffins.
